title: Hasugoods
description: Adds Hasunosora Girls' High School Idol Club items to the game.
body:
**Many features / items in this mod are WIP.**

---

Obtain Hasunosara badges from loots or trades, and craft your favorite nesoberi from there!

You can use nesoberis to decorate your room, but be aware that they are entities that can be pushed away by other objects or creatures.

Some nesos might have some special abilities which consume power. Charge your nesos with the neso base block, or even better, the position zero block!
